title: 13 STR polymorphic loci for Aulactinia stella and Cribrinopsis albopunctata
author: Ekaterina S. Bocharova
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Here is a dataset of *.fsa files (the Prism Genetic Analyzer 3100, Applied Biosystems) of pool DNA PCR product of 13 STR polymorphic loci for Aulactinia stella and Cribrinopsis albopunctata.
steps_raw: Here is a dataset of *.fsa files (the Prism Genetic Analyzer 3100, Applied Biosystems) of pool DNA PCR product of 13 STR polymorphic loci for Aulactinia stella and Cribrinopsis albopunctata.
